topics.name: ND I & ND II: YABATECH Computer Hardware, Electronics, and Workshop
topics.description: CTE 111, CTE 121 Digital Logic, Electronic Devices, Computer Hardware Maintenance, and Workshop Practice.

subtopics.name: CTE 111 & CTE 121: Digital Electronics and Logic Design (YABATECH)
objectives: Study logic gates, flip-flops, counters, registers, and Boolean algebraic simplification
Assemble and troubleshoot digital logic circuits on breadboards in YABATECH labs

subtopics.name: CTE 211: Computer Hardware System Maintenance & Assembly
objectives: Diagnose PC motherboard components, power supply units, RAM, storage, and peripheral installation
Perform computer system troubleshooting, OS formatting, and network cabling (RJ45 crimping)

topics.name: HND I & HND II: Microprocessors, Embedded Systems, and YABATECH Project
topics.description: Microcomputer Systems, Embedded C/Assembly, Interfacing, and Final HND Project.

subtopics.name: CTE 311 & CTE 411: Microprocessor Architecture & Embedded Systems
objectives: Program 8086/ARM microprocessors and microcontrollers (Arduino/PIC) for industrial automation
Interface analog-to-digital converters (ADC), sensors, motors, and LCD displays

subtopics.name: CTE 499: Final Year HND Hardware Engineering Project
objectives: Design, solder, test, and defend hardware project prototype before NBTE and YABATECH academic board
